entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop grown in Africa susceptible to Striga parasitism

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: The geographical region where pearl millet is grown and nutrient deficiency is a problem

entities.name: NUTRIENT DEFICIENCY
entities.description: A state of soil mineral deficiency that triggers the secretion of strigolactones by pearl millet

entities.name: STRIGOLACTONES
entities.description: Germination stimulants secreted by pearl millet into the soil in response to nutrient deficiency

entities.name: STRIGA HERMONTHICA
entities.description: A parasitic weed that infects pearl millet crops

entities.name: DI-AMMONIUM PHOSPHATE
entities.description: A fertilizer used in microdosing to reduce strigolactone production and Striga infection

entities.name: GREENHOUSE EXPERIMENT
entities.description: The experimental setup used to evaluate the influence of DAP fertilizer on strigolactones and Striga

entities.name: KBH
entities.description: A cultivar of pearl millet used in the study

entities.name: SADORE LOCAL
entities.description: A cultivar of pearl millet used in the study

entities.name: STRIGA RESISTANCE
entities.description: A cultivar of pearl millet used in the study

entities.name: OROBANCHOL
entities.description: A specific type of strigolactone produced by pearl millet

entities.name: EPI-OROBANCHOL
entities.description: A specific type of strigolactone produced by pearl millet

entities.name: OROBANCHYL ACETATE
entities.description: A specific type of strigolactone produced by pearl millet

entities.name: 5-DEOXYSTRIGOL
entities.description: A specific type of strigolactone produced by pearl millet

entities.name: STRIGA GERMINATION
entities.description: The process of Striga seeds sprouting, triggered by strigolactones

entities.name: STRIGA EMERGENCE
entities.description: The process of Striga seedlings emerging from the soil

entities.name: DRY BIOMASS PRODUCTION
entities.description: The measurement of the growth and mass of Striga plants

entities.name: LEGUMES
entities.description: Crops used in intercropping to control Striga

entities.name: INTERCROPPING
entities.description: An agricultural strategy of growing two or more crops together to control Striga

entities.name: HAND PULLING
entities.description: A manual method of removing Striga plants at the flowering stage
